function: Tracks willingness and capacity to be observed, traced, and understood at each compression layer
authentic_output: Glyph trace emitted with compression rationale
corrupted_output: Opaque glyph logic under shared context
information_provided: Tracks willingness and capacity to be observed, traced, and understood at each compression layer.

response_protocol.detect: Detect compressed logic not explainable, refusal to emit audit trail, or optimization over interpretability
response_protocol.assess: Assess audit trail gaps and message opacity
response_protocol.respond: Emit glyph trace with compression rationale
response_protocol.release: Avoid opaque glyph logic under shared context; allow transparency to restore naturally
